rules.title: 📋 Following Rules
rules.html:
Rules are important! They help us stay safe and be kind to each other.

At school, we follow many rules. We take turns when we speak. We share our things with friends. We listen to the teacher and we clean up after ourselves.

On the street, we follow traffic rules. We wait for the green light before crossing. We look left and right. We are always polite to other people.

It is important to ask for permission. We say 'May I...?' or 'Can I...?' before doing something. Being disrespectful means not following the rules or being rude to others.

In an emergency, we must follow special rules. We stay calm, we listen to adults, and we go to a safe place.

places.title: 🏠 Rules in Different Places
places.html:
Different places have different rules. Let's learn about them!

In the kitchen, we don't run. We are careful with hot things. We wash our hands before cooking.

In the living room, we don't jump on the sofa. We keep our things tidy.

In the classroom, we raise our hand before speaking. We don't talk when the teacher is talking.

In the cafeteria, we wait in line. We say 'please' and 'thank you'. We clean up after eating.

On the playground, we share the swings. We don't push other children. In the gym, we wear sports clothes and follow the coach's instructions.

Whose bag is this? It is mine. Is this your book? No, it is hers. These are our rules. We all follow them.
